title: Amscan 117800-06 - Pink Star Balloon Weight - 150g
features: Keep your balloon bouquet secure with this pretty pink star balloon weight.
Easily secure helium balloons to a balloon weight or weighted centrepiece to stop your bouquet from floating away.
Simply secure the balloons using balloon or curling ribbon. (Sold separately)
This weight weighs: 170g and can hold up to 10x latex or 12x foil balloons.
description: Product Description A balloon weight is a must-have to secure your balloon bouquet in place. We have weights available in an array of colours and designs, perfect to match any party theme! Don’t forget that all important balloon ribbon to complete the look! Box Contains Sold individually
